programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: (M) A small-town family strikes it rich when they find a natural gas pocket under their property; When one of the family members shines brightly, not everyone wants her star to rise.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.sub-title: I Want to Be Seen as Evil
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: (M) When Beth Spaulding and Jason Risenburg meet, it looks like a match made in heaven; however, a series of disasters strike, causing tensions to simmer in their marriage.
